---
title: "Madagascar Influenza — Phylogenetic Analysis"
subtitle: "IQ-TREE ML trees · Monophyletic clade analysis"
author: "Camila Duitama"
date: today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    output-file: "trees.html"
    output-dir: "../docs"
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-title: "Contents"
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 6
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd

RESULTS_DIR = Path("../results")
TREES_DIR   = Path("../trees")
```

← [Back to main report](index.html)

---

## Pipeline

**Up to 16 maximum-likelihood trees** (IQ-TREE 3.1.0, HKY+G, UFBoot2 1000 replicates, seed 42) across all segment × subtype combinations with ≥ 10 Madagascar and ≥ 20 African sequences.
All sequences are used — **no subsampling**.

**Question:** do Madagascar sequences form monophyletic clades (local transmission) or are they singletons (sporadic importation)?

| Category | Segments | Strategy | Trees |
|----------|----------|----------|-------|
| HA per-subtype | HA | One tree per HA subtype | up to 5 |
| NA per-subtype | NA | One tree per NA subtype | up to 5 |
| Internal merged | PB2, PB1, PA, NP, MP, NS | All subtypes merged per segment | 6 |
| **Total** | | | **up to 16** |

Internal segments are merged across subtypes (they reassort freely and do not cluster by HxNy).
HA/NA are kept per-subtype (distinct antigenic lineages with long inter-subtype branches).

### Clade detection

Branches with UFBoot2 support < 70 are collapsed into polytomies before clade detection (`scripts/analyse_trees.py`, ete3). A **monophyletic Madagascar clade** = maximal subtree (≥ 2 tips) whose leaves are exclusively Madagascar sequences.

### Statistics computed per tree

| Metric | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| `n_mdg_clades` | Number of monophyletic Madagascar clades (≥ 2 tips) |
| `mdg_pd_fraction` | Malagasy Faith's PD ÷ total tree PD — share of total tree diversity that is exclusively Malagasy |
| `mrca_subtree_fraction` | Branch lengths within the MRCA subtree of all Malagasy tips ÷ total tree PD — how concentrated the Malagasy sequences are in the tree |

### Statistics computed per clade

| Metric | Meaning |
|--------|---------|
| `internal_bl` | Sum of branch lengths within the clade — within-Madagascar diversity |
| `stem_bl` | Branch from clade root to parent — divergence from nearest African ancestor |
| `clade_prop_tree_bl` | `internal_bl` ÷ total tree branch length — clade's share of total tree diversity |

::: {.callout-note}
**TODO:** Re-run `scripts/run_trees.sh` (trees pending with full sequences + UFBoot2), then re-run `scripts/analyse_trees.py --force` and update this report.
:::
